title: Egghead Falls Under Siege
description: On pages 2–4, this part focuses on Vegapunk, Marines, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Luffy, Unknown person #3 as CP0 attacks Egghead, Seraphim enter the conflict, Stussy betrays CP0, Kuma moves toward the Red Line, and Vegapunk’s escape plan collapses.
scene: CP0 attacks Egghead, Seraphim enter the conflict, Stussy betrays CP0, Kuma moves toward the Red Line, and Vegapunk’s escape plan collapses.

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: aren't you guys with the navy!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: don't let government weapons get in our way!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's on a different level from the prototypes used in the paramount war.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: vegapunk invented it!! It's a powerful shield!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: everyone surrender! If you fight him you'll only end up dying!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: there's no way a pacifista would just act on its own like that!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Looks like something happened up there.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: They even closed the frontier dome.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I CAN'T GET IN CONTACT WITH...

summary: This part advances the Egghead Under Siege through 25 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
